summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Automate Accounts e-store session persistence. AuthContext fix successful - login sessions now persist perfectly across all navigation patterns and browser refreshes.
passed_tests: Login session persistence across Store navigation (brand link)
Login session persistence across Portal navigation
Login session persistence across Admin panel navigation
Session persistence after browser refresh on all pages
Categories dropdown functionality with session maintained
Navigation structure analysis - proper routing between /store, /portal, /admin
Professional UI design with consistent branding across all pages
Customer portal with orders and subscriptions display
Admin control center with 5 tabs (Customers, Orders, Subscriptions, Catalog, Zoho sync logs)
Store page with Zoho service categories and pricing display
Currency override functionality in admin panel
